scripts.i: yarn install && cd ios && pod install && cd ..
scripts.build:ios: cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace TurboSqliteExample.xcworkspace -scheme TurboSqliteExample -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator CC=clang CPLUSPLUS=clang++ LD=clang LDPLUSPLUS=clang++ GCC_OPTIMIZATION_LEVEL=0 GCC_PRECOMPILE_PREFIX_HEADER=YES ASSETCATALOG_COMPILER_OPTIMIZATION=time DEBUG_INFORMATION_FORMAT=dwarf COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO
scripts.clean: yarn clean:ios; yarn clean:android; yarn clean:node; yarn clean:cache
scripts.clean:ios: cd ios && rm -rf build Pods Podfile.lock && xcodebuild -workspace TurboSqliteExample.xcworkspace -scheme TurboSqliteExample clean 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.clean:android: cd android && ./gradlew clean && rm -rf .gradle .cxx app/build build || true
